---
title: "Selina Mary Moor"
---

## Selina Mary Moor

**Dates:** (b. 1860)

### Description

only daughter of the Rev. John Frewen Moor, jr.

### Biography

She became a travelling spinster. [<i>Erminois</i>; 6 months at 1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from April 5th 1880
- Letter from Novr 28 1879
- Letter from Oct 26th 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
